description: Client: Meridian Capital Digital. Enterprise fintech, primary market MENA. Currently on Kochava, migrating to AppsFlyer. iOS, Android, and Flutter across three product lines. Attribution model preference: last touch. Backend is Java, they have a Snowflake warehouse plus S3 exports. Uses mParticle as their CDP. Auth method: API Key. Target go-live 2026-09-30. Critical priority — regulatory deadline. Both S2S postbacks and SKAdNetwork required; also Custom Dashboard Export.
